member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.INodeUrlValidator
member.summary: Contract for validating a node server URL before it is persisted or used in outbound HTTP calls — primary SSRF-prevention boundary.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.INodeUrlValidator.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that is a well-formed, non-private, non-loopback HTTPS URL suitable for inter-node communication.
member.returns: null when the URL is valid; otherwise a human-readable error message describing why the URL was rejected.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.ITenantProfile
member.summary: Read-only profile of a tenant node as exposed at the module boundary.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.ITenantProfile.TenantId
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of this tenant.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.ITenantProfile.Name
member.summary: Gets the display name of this tenant.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.ITenantProfile.Type
member.summary: Gets the supply-chain role of this tenant.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.ManufacturerType
member.summary: Identifies the category of goods a manufacturer specialises in. Drives which cut-list and pricing engines are applied to their products.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.ManufacturerType.Cabinet
member.summary: Produces cabinet carcasses and storage units.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.ManufacturerType.Door
member.summary: Produces interior and exterior doors.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.ManufacturerType.Window
member.summary: Produces windows and glazed units.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.TenantType
member.summary: Classifies the role a tenant plays within the SpaceOS supply chain.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.TenantType.Manufacturer
member.summary: Produces finished goods (cabinets, doors, windows, etc.).

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.TenantType.Supplier
member.summary: Supplies raw materials or components to manufacturers.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.TenantType.Dealer
member.summary: Sells and distributes products to end clients.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.TenantType.Installer
member.summary: Performs on-site installation of products.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.TenantType.Designer
member.summary: Creates design specifications and drawings.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Actors.TenantType.Client
member.summary: End customer who commissions or purchases work.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Catalog.IMaterialSpec
member.summary: Describes the physical properties of a board or sheet material available from a supplier.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Catalog.IMaterialSpec.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of this material specification.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Catalog.IMaterialSpec.MaterialType
member.summary: Gets the substrate type of the material (e.g. "MDF", "Particle", "Plywood").

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Catalog.IMaterialSpec.Thickness
member.summary: Gets the nominal thickness of the board in millimetres.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Catalog.IMaterialSpec.Surface
member.summary: Gets the surface finish applied to the board (e.g. "Melamine", "Veneer", "Laminate").

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Catalog.IProductCatalog
member.summary: Read-only query surface for a tenant's parametric product catalogue.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Catalog.IProductCatalog.GetProductsAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all parametric products belonging to .
member.param: The tenant whose catalogue is being queried.
member.returns: A read-only list of products; never null, may be empty.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Catalog.IProductCatalog.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the parametric product with the given identifier, or null when no product with that identifier exists in the catalogue.
member.param: The product identifier to look up.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Catalog.ISupplierCatalog
member.summary: Provides real-time material availability and pricing data from a supplier's catalogue.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Catalog.ISupplierCatalog.GetMaterialsAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all materials listed in the catalogue of .
member.returns: A read-only list of material specs; never null, may be empty.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Catalog.ISupplierCatalog.GetPriceAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the current unit price for from , or null when the material is not priced.
member.param: The supplier material code to look up.
member.returns: Unit price as a , or null.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Catalog.ISupplierCatalog.GetStockAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the current stock quantity for held by , or null when stock data is unavailable.
member.param: The supplier material code to look up.
member.returns: Available stock count as an , or null.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Crypto.IColumnEncryptionService
member.summary: Provides symmetric column-level encryption for sensitive fields stored in the database. Implementations are expected to use an authenticated encryption scheme (e.g. AES-256-GCM) with a key sourced from IKeyVaultService.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Crypto.IColumnEncryptionService.Encrypt(System.String)
member.summary: Encrypts and returns a Base64-encoded ciphertext string suitable for storage.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Crypto.IColumnEncryptionService.Decrypt(System.String)
member.summary: Decrypts a Base64-encoded ciphertext previously produced by and returns the original plaintext value.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Crypto.IKeyVaultService
member.summary: Retrieves cryptographic key material from a secure key store (e.g. Azure Key Vault). All keys are returned as raw byte arrays so that callers remain independent of any particular key serialisation format.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Crypto.IKeyVaultService.GetSigningKeyAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves the current RSA private key used to sign inter-node JWTs.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Crypto.IKeyVaultService.GetEncryptionKeyAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves the current AES key used for column-level encryption.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.AnchorType
member.summary: Identifies the kind of SpaceOS entity that a points to.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.AnchorType.Epic
member.summary: The anchor targets a FlowEpic.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.AnchorType.Project
member.summary: The anchor targets a project-level entity.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.AnchorType.Program
member.summary: The anchor targets a program-level entity.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeAnchor
member.summary: Immutable value object that anchors one side of a handshake to a specific SpaceOS entity owned by a tenant.
member.param: The hierarchy level of the anchor.
The tenant that owns the anchored entity.
The identifier of the anchored flow node.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeAnchor.#ctor(SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.AnchorType,System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Immutable value object that anchors one side of a handshake to a specific SpaceOS entity owned by a tenant.
member.param: The hierarchy level of the anchor.
The tenant that owns the anchored entity.
The identifier of the anchored flow node.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeAnchor.Type
member.summary: The hierarchy level of the anchor.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeAnchor.TenantId
member.summary: The tenant that owns the anchored entity.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeAnchor.FlowNodeId
member.summary: The identifier of the anchored flow node.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeState
member.summary: FSM states for the lifecycle of a handshake between two SpaceOS nodes.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeState.Proposed
member.summary: The initiator has proposed the handshake; awaiting response.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeState.Accepted
member.summary: The responsible party has accepted the proposal.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeState.InProgress
member.summary: Both parties are actively engaged on delivery.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeState.AwaitingApproval
member.summary: Delivery is complete and the initiator's approval is pending.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeState.Completed
member.summary: All obligations have been fulfilled and the initiator has approved.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeState.Rejected
member.summary: The responsible party has declined the proposal.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeState.Cancelled
member.summary: The initiator has withdrawn the handshake.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeType
member.summary: Identifies the directional relationship between the two parties in a handshake, representing the role-to-role flow in the SpaceOS supply chain.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeType.DesignToManufacturer
member.summary: Handshake initiated by a designer toward a manufacturer.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeType.ManufacturerToSupplier
member.summary: Handshake initiated by a manufacturer toward a supplier.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeType.DesignToInstaller
member.summary: Handshake initiated by a designer toward an installer.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeType.ClientToDesigner
member.summary: Handshake initiated by a client toward a designer.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeType.DealerToManufacturer
member.summary: Handshake initiated by a dealer toward a manufacturer.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeType.SupplierToManufacturer
member.summary: Handshake initiated by a supplier toward a manufacturer.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeType.InstallerToSupplier
member.summary: Handshake initiated by an installer toward a supplier.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeType.SelfTask
member.summary: A self-assigned task with a single actor on both sides.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeVisibilityScope
member.summary: Controls how much information each party in a handshake can see.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeVisibilityScope.PublicMilestone
member.summary: Only public milestone data is visible to both parties.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeVisibilityScope.DeliveryOnly
member.summary: Delivery schedule and status are shared.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeVisibilityScope.SpecShared
member.summary: Specification documents are also shared.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.HandshakeVisibilityScope.FullTransparent
member.summary: Full transparency — all data is visible to both parties.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.IHandshake
member.summary: Cross-module contract for a handshake — a bilateral commitment between two tenant nodes within a SpaceOS workflow.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.IHandshake.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of this handshake.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.IHandshake.InitiatorTenantId
member.summary: Gets the tenant identifier of the party who initiated the handshake.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.IHandshake.ResponsibleTenantId
member.summary: Gets the tenant identifier of the party responsible for delivery.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.IHandshake.InitiatorAnchor
member.summary: Gets the optional anchor that links the initiator side of this handshake to a specific SpaceOS entity.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.IHandshake.ResponsibleAnchor
member.summary: Gets the optional anchor that links the responsible side of this handshake to a specific SpaceOS entity.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.IHandshake.Scope
member.summary: Gets the data visibility level agreed between both parties.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.IHandshake.State
member.summary: Gets the current FSM state of this handshake.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.IHandshake.Type
member.summary: Gets the directional type of this handshake.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.IHandshake.ContractHash
member.summary: Gets the optional SHA-256 hash of the contract document attached to this handshake. null when no contract has been attached.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Handshake.IHandshake.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp at which this handshake was created.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.IFlowNode
member.summary: Represents a node within a workflow flow — the cross-module contract for any unit of work that participates in a SpaceOS flow.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.IFlowNode.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of this flow node.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.IFlowNode.Name
member.summary: Gets the human-readable name of this flow node.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.IFlowNode.Phase
member.summary: Gets the current workflow phase of this flow node.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Products.ICutListCalculator
member.summary: Calculates the cut-list (panel schedule) for a parametric product given a JSON-encoded set of configuration parameters. Implementations are resolved per manufacturer type and registered in the module's composition root.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Products.ICutListCalculator.CalculateAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Derives the ordered list of panels required to build a product with the supplied configuration.
member.param: A JSON object whose keys are parameter names and whose values are the configured values (e.g. {"Width":600,"Doors":2}).
member.returns: A JSON-encoded cut-list document; never null or empty.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Products.IHardwareResolver
member.summary: Resolves the hardware bill-of-materials for a parametric product given a JSON-encoded set of configuration parameters.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Products.IHardwareResolver.ResolveAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the list of hardware components required to build a product with the supplied configuration.
member.param: A JSON object whose keys are parameter names and whose values are the configured values (e.g. {"HingeCount":4,"DrawerCount":2}).
member.returns: A JSON-encoded hardware list document; never null or empty.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Products.IParametricProduct
member.summary: Describes a configurable product whose dimensions and bill-of-materials are derived from a set of named parameters at order time.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Products.IParametricProduct.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of this product definition.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Products.IParametricProduct.Sku
member.summary: Gets the stock-keeping unit code that uniquely identifies this product within the manufacturer's catalogue.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Products.IParametricProduct.Name
member.summary: Gets the human-readable product name.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Products.IParametricProduct.ParametersJson
member.summary: Gets the JSON-encoded parameter schema for this product. The schema defines the names, types, and constraints of configuration values accepted by the cut-list and hardware calculators.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Products.IPricingResolver
member.summary: Resolves the sell price for a fully-configured parametric product, incorporating both the supplier's material cost and an optional dealer margin.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Products.IPricingResolver.ResolvePriceAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves the price for a product, including supplier cost and, when is provided, the dealer's margin.
member.param: The identifier of the product to price.
The identifier of the supplier whose material pricing is used as the cost base.
The optional identifier of the dealer whose margin is applied to the supplier price. Pass null to return the supplier price only.
member.returns: The resolved price as a non-negative .

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.INodeAuthService
member.summary: Issues and validates short-lived JWTs used for inter-node authentication during SIP synchronisation.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.INodeAuthService.IssueNodeJwtAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Issues a signed JWT that authorises to call the node at .
member.param: The tenant on whose behalf the token is issued.
The target node URL to embed as the audience claim.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.INodeAuthService.ValidateNodeJwtAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates a previously issued node JWT and returns whether it is currently valid (signature, expiry, and audience all pass).
member.returns: true when the token is valid; otherwise false.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.INodeManifest
member.summary: Describes a registered SpaceOS node as seen by the Kernel during discovery and heartbeat exchanges.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.INodeManifest.TenantId
member.summary: Gets the tenant identifier that owns this node.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.INodeManifest.ServerUrl
member.summary: Gets the base HTTPS URL at which this node's public API is reachable.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.INodeManifest.PublicApiVersion
member.summary: Gets the SIP API version advertised by this node (e.g. "1.0").

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.INodeManifest.LastHeartbeatAt
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp of the last heartbeat received from this node, or null when no heartbeat has been received yet.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.INodeManifest.MaxGuestLod
member.summary: Gets the maximum level-of-detail (LOD) that guest callers may request from this node. A value of 0 means guests receive no data.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.ISyncable
member.summary: Marks an entity as eligible for two-way synchronisation with the SpaceOS Kernel.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.ISyncable.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of this entity.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.ISyncable.IsSyncedToKernel
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this entity has been successfully synchronised with the Kernel at least once.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.ISyncable.LastSyncAt
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp of the most recent successful sync, or null if the entity has never been synchronised.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.SyncConstants
member.summary: Compile-time constants for the SpaceOS Inter-node Protocol (SIP) sync layer. These values are part of the public module contract and must not be changed without a SIP version bump.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.SyncConstants.GenesisHash
member.summary: The all-zeros hash used as the previous-hash value for the very first audit entry in a chain (genesis block sentinel).

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.SyncConstants.SipVersion
member.summary: The current SpaceOS Inter-node Protocol (SIP) version string.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.SyncConstants.NodeJwtTtlHours
member.summary: Lifetime in hours of a node-to-node JWT issued by INodeAuthService.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.Sync.SyncConstants.OfflineQueueTtlDays
member.summary: Maximum age in days that an undelivered offline sync command is kept in the outbox before being discarded.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.WorkflowPhase
member.summary: Represents the workflow phase of a flow node at the module boundary. This is the canonical definition shared across all SpaceOS modules.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.WorkflowPhase.Discovery
member.summary: Discovery phase — requirements gathering and initial scoping.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.WorkflowPhase.Delivery
member.summary: Delivery phase — active production or execution.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Abstractions.WorkflowPhase.ClosedDone
member.summary: Closed / done — the unit of work is complete.
